note: Scratch arm policy with one continuous kinematic motion reward: no explicit standing posture angle, no low-speed still threshold, outward lateral foot velocity raises only the opposite arm. Command: KinematicScratchVelLegOpp: checkpoint=null; old shoulder style and arm energy rewards disabled; pitch target from abs(vx_cmd)*left-right foot x distance; side roll uses outward foot velocity plus left_roll+right_roll lock so right foot moving outward -> left arm and left foot moving outward -> right arm.
